title: Sign in and land on the correct role dashboard
description: A user can sign in with valid credentials and is redirected to their role-specific dashboard with appropriate modules visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on a role-specific dashboard
Verify navigation modules appropriate to the role are visible

title: Doctor can record a session with service, materials, and optional coupon
description: This test verifies a doctor can open a completed appointment, record a session with a service and materials, optionally preview a coupon discount, submit, and see saved financial totals including net profit.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a completed appointment from the doctor schedule
Click to create a session record
Select a performed service
Add a material line item
Select a material
Fill a valid positive quantity into the material quantity field
Fill a coupon code into the coupon field
Click to preview the coupon discount
Submit the session
Verify the saved session shows service price, discount amount, total materials cost, and net profit

title: Decrement inventory stock when doctor submits a session using materials
description: Verifies a doctor can record a session that uses a material and the material stock quantity decreases by the used amount after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the schedule or daily calendar view
Open an appointment from today
Open the patient file for the appointment
Start creating a new session record
Add a material usage line item to the session
Select a material that shows available stock
Fill a small positive quantity into the material quantity field
Submit the session
Verify a session save confirmation is visible
Verify the selected material shows a reduced remaining stock compared to before the session

title: Restore an existing session into the correct dashboard
description: A signed-in user who reloads the app remains signed in and returns to the correct role dashboard without re-authenticating.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Reload the page
Verify the user remains signed in and stays on a role-specific dashboard

title: Doctor can create and save a treatment session in a patient file
description: This test verifies a doctor can open a patient file from the patient list, create a new treatment session, save it, and see it appended in the patient file.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the patient list
Open a patient file for a listed patient
Click to add a new treatment session
Fill required session details with valid values
Submit the session form
Verify the new session entry is displayed in the patient file timeline or session list

title: Prevent authenticated access to another role dashboard via direct navigation
description: A signed-in user cannot access a different role dashboard route and is redirected or blocked appropriately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify access is blocked or the user is redirected back to their own role dashboard

title: Log out and require login to access dashboards
description: A signed-in user can log out and is then blocked from accessing any authenticated dashboard until signing in again.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Navigate to /doctor
Verify the user is redirected to the login screen

title: Assistant can create an appointment and see it appear in the calendar
description: An assistant can create an appointment by selecting patient, doctor, date, time, and duration and then sees it listed on the chosen date.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the assistant portal
Open appointment creation
Select an existing patient
Select a doctor
Fill a valid date into the appointment date field
Select a valid start time
Select a valid duration
Submit to save the appointment
Verify the appointment is listed in the calendar for the chosen date

title: Apply a valid coupon in session and record discount
description: Verifies a doctor can preview and apply a valid coupon during session creation and the saved session shows a recorded discount.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the schedule or daily calendar view
Open an appointment from today
Open the patient file for the appointment
Start creating a new session record
Enter a valid coupon code into the coupon field
Request a coupon preview
Apply the coupon to the session
Submit the session
Verify the saved session displays a non-zero discount amount

title: Create inventory item and see it listed with stock
description: Verifies an admin can create a new material/tool with unit price and stock quantity and the item appears in the inventory list with its current stock.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the inventory or materials/tools module
Open the create inventory item form
Fill a unique name into the item name field
Select a valid item type
Fill a valid unit price into the unit price field
Fill a valid stock quantity into the stock quantity field
Submit the inventory item form
Verify the new inventory item appears in the inventory list with a displayed stock quantity

title: Doctor daily calendar shows only assigned appointments
description: A doctor can view the daily calendar and sees only appointments assigned to them for the selected day.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the doctor portal
Open the daily calendar view
Verify only appointments assigned to the signed-in doctor are displayed for the selected day

title: Assistant can create a patient record
description: This test verifies an assistant can create a new patient with required demographic/contact details and the patient appears in the patient list afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open patient creation
Fill a unique patient full name into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Submit the patient form
Verify the new patient appears in the patient list

title: Create a new clinic user account
description: An admin can create a user with a role and permission flags and the new user appears in the user list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open user management
Click the action to create a new user
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Select a role for the new user
Select at least one permission flag
Submit the user creation form
Verify the new user appears in the user list

title: Superadmin can disable a module for a role and impacted navigation updates
description: Verifies a Superadmin can disable a module for a specific role and the impacted role’s portal navigation no longer shows that module.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open module management
Disable one module for a selected role
Save the module visibility changes
Click to open the affected role’s portal
Verify the disabled module is not available in the affected role’s navigation

title: Reject sign-in with invalid credentials
description: A user who enters an incorrect password cannot sign in and sees a credentials validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid.user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify a credentials validation error is visible

title: Run a filtered session financial report and view net profit fields
description: Verifies an accountant can run a session-level report with a date range and optional filters and see sessions listed with service price, materials cost, discount, and net profit.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the reports module
Select a valid date range for the report
Select a doctor filter option
Select a service filter option
Run the session report
Verify a list of session report rows is displayed
Verify each displayed session row includes service price, materials cost, discount, and net profit fields

title: Admin can edit an appointment and see the updated details
description: An admin can open an existing appointment from the calendar, edit its details, save, and see the changes reflected in the calendar.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the admin dashboard
Open appointment management calendar
Open an existing appointment from the calendar
Change the appointment date to another valid date
Change the appointment start time to another valid time
Save the appointment changes
Verify the calendar shows the appointment at the updated time and date

title: Admin can search and open a patient detail to view history
description: This test verifies an admin can create a patient, search by name or phone, open the patient detail, and see demographics plus visit history sections displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open patient creation
Fill a unique patient full name into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Submit the patient form
Fill the patient search field with the created patient name
Open the patient detail from the search results
Verify patient demographics are displayed
Verify visit history is displayed

title: Create a percent or fixed coupon and see it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a coupon with type, value, and validity window and the coupon appears in the coupons list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the coupons module
Open the create coupon form
Fill a unique coupon code into the coupon code field
Select a valid coupon type
Fill a valid coupon value into the value field
Select a validity start date within an allowed range
Select a validity end date after the start date
Save the coupon
Verify the new coupon appears in the coupons list

title: Deactivate a user account from superadmin portal
description: A superadmin can toggle a user to inactive and the user is shown as inactive in the system user list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the system user list
Select a user from the list
Toggle the user's active status to inactive
Verify the user is shown as inactive in the system user list

title: Module visibility change blocks access to the module entry point for affected role
description: Verifies that after a module is disabled for a role, the user cannot access the module entry point through normal portal navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open module management
Disable one module for a selected role
Save the module visibility changes
Click to open the affected role’s portal
Attempt to open the disabled module from the portal navigation
Verify access to the disabled module is blocked through the UI

title: Admin can edit patient contact details
description: This test verifies an admin can create a patient, edit contact details, save changes, and see the updated patient information reflected in the patient record.

title: Assign a practitioner type to a doctor profile

title: Batch-send pending reminders from admin portal

Select a valid appointment time
Save the appointment

Fill a message into the notification content field

Save the coupon

Fill in a valid new password into the new password field
